description: Free, open, installable Agentforce agents. Each agent is gated by the OBJECTS that must exist in the target org (the real capability test) — not just by license name, because licenses can be present while the backing objects/managed packages are not.

agents.label: Field Service Scheduler
agents.summary: Turns an Order for a serviceable product into a Work Order + appointment, offers real available time slots, and books the customer's choice.

agents.label: Service Appointment Closer
agents.summary: Helps a technician/dispatcher close out a visit: marks the appointment Completed, rolls the Work Order to Completed, and records a completion summary (creates a Service Report when that object is available).

agents.label: Knowledge Concierge
agents.summary: Answers customer/agent questions only from your published Knowledge articles, returning titles, summaries, and links — deflecting safely when nothing matches.
agents.note: Needs Lightning Knowledge enabled with at least one published article type (a *__kav object). The agent compiles everywhere (dynamic SOSL) but only returns answers where Knowledge is set up.

agents.label: Order / Commerce Concierge
agents.summary: Looks up an order by number, summarizes its status and line items, and reorders (clones) it on request — PII-gated to only the order asked about.

agents.label: Case Service Agent
agents.summary: Creates, triages, comments on, and resolves Cases with a recorded resolution — anti-hallucination guarded so it never claims an action it didn't take.

agents.label: Sales Opportunity Coach
agents.summary: Internal sales copilot: summarizes an opportunity's health, recommends the next-best step, and records it (with a follow-up task) on request.

agents.label: Stale-Deal Sweeper
agents.summary: Autonomous: on a daily schedule, finds open opportunities idle past a threshold, logs a follow-up task, and sets a next step if blank. Headless exemplar — no chat UI.
